query:
UPDATE users SET onboardingComplete = false, onboardingStage = 1 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM users LIMIT 1);
SELECT id, name, onboardingComplete, onboardingStage, activityStreak FROM users LIMIT 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute UPDATE users SET onboardingComplete = false, onboardingStage = 1 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM users LIMIT 1);
